productDisplayName: Fossil Men Steel-Toned Dial Chronograph Watch CH2790
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case, a stainless steel back and a fixed bezelDial style: Grey dial with markings and glow-in-the-dark handsFeatures: Three-faced chronograph display, a date aperture, a screw to reset the time, two push-buttons to adjust the features like alarm and timerStrap style: Steel-toned and gold-tonednbsp;bracelet-style strap secured with a butterfly claspWater-resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Fossil caseWarranty: 2-year international warranty from the date of purchase against manufacturing defectWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
